hero.title: Welcome to Aquapark
hero.subtitle: The best summer destination for families

about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: Aquapark Kuli Dushanbe — the best family recreation destination
about.description: We are a modern water park with unique attractions.
about.visitorsDesc: Over the years we have delighted more than 100,000 guests, and that number keeps growing every day.
about.teamDesc: Our friendly and experienced staff are always ready to help. Your happiness is our top priority.
about.missionDesc: To provide safe, joyful and unforgettable experiences for every guest — from children to adults.

attractions.title: Attractions
attractions.subtitle: Best attractions at Aquapark Kuli Dushanbe

slide1.name: Ring Slide
slide1.desc: Thrilling ring slide for adults and kids — incredible speed and unforgettable fun!

slide2.name: Kids Zone
slide2.desc: Special area for young children with safe slides and clean water.

slide3.name: Wave Pool
slide3.desc: Huge wave pool — feel the real ocean right in the heart of the city!

slide4.name: High Slides
slide4.desc: Tall colorful slides for thrill-seekers and adrenaline lovers.

slide5.name: Relaxation Pool
slide5.desc: Large calm pool perfect for relaxing with the whole family.

contact.subtitle: Get in touch with us
contact.name: Your name
contact.success: Your message has been received! We will reply soon.
contact.error: An error occurred. Please try again.

footer.description: Unforgettable moments at the heart of the capital's entertainment.

items.req1: Children under 16 are not allowed without adult supervision
items.req2: Shower is required before using attractions and pools
items.req3: Swimming and sliding strictly in swimwear only
items.req4: Children must wear waterproof diapers in pools and slides
items.req5: Hair must be tied up when swimming or going down slides
items.req6: Please queue at ticket office and attractions
items.req8: CCTV cameras are operating throughout the premises
items.proh1: Bringing your own food and drinks is prohibited
items.proh2: It is prohibited to use rides while under the influence of alcohol or drugs
items.proh3: Running and overtaking on the stairs of pools and slides is prohibited
items.proh4: Do not jump into the pool head first
items.proh7: Glass containers, sharp and dangerous objects are prohibited
items.proh8: Photography with professional equipment without admin consent is prohibited
items.resp1: Visitors are responsible for their own safety
items.resp2: Visitor must compensate for any damage caused to aquapark property
items.resp3: The aquapark administration is not responsible for personal belongings left unattended
items.resp4: Visitors who violate the rules may be removed from the aquapark
